body.summary: Review LOCK 015 spec for Tripp.Control Governance Readiness Summary module.
body.context: Tripp.Control is a local-first governance spine. LOCK 015 is a meta-layer that reports whether the governance spine is ready for future runtime/provider/dashboard layers.
body.spec_extract: LOCK 015 creates generateGovernanceReadinessSummary(input) that returns readiness metadata: status, readiness_id, completed_locks, missing_locks, available/unavailable capabilities, safety_boundaries, next_safe_layers, blocked_layers, safety_flags (all false).
body.your_job: Review the LOCK 015 spec. Is it well-scoped? Does it correctly assess readiness without overstepping? Return structured feedback.
body.output_format: JSON response with review_items array. Each item: {severity, category, description, suggestion}
